pi_items.metadata_value: Based on real iTunes Library data
pi_items.verified_value: Media data from real iTunes Libraries; customer/employee records are fictional with realistic addresses; sales data auto-generated randomly
pi_items.source: GitHub repository https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database - official Chinook database created by Luis Rocha

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a publicly available real sample database created by Luis Rocha (GitHub: lerocha/chinook-database), containing 59 customers across 24 countries. Target country customer counts: USA=13, Canada=8, France=5. With promo amounts of $10 USD, $15 CAD, and $20 EUR respectively, the expected totals are $130, $120, and $100. The invoices table contains 412 existing invoices without a campaign_tag column. All metadata claims in task.json are correct and supported by the actual database structure.
